Andrew Griffith
Member of Parliament for Arundel & South Downs

Contact Me

  • Tweet

How you can contact me

Before contacting me, you should check that this is a matter your Member of Parliament can actually deal with. There are some details here.

If you are a constituent – please check here first – please write to:

Andrew Griffith MP
House of Commons 
Westminster
London
SW1A 0AA

Alternatively, you may wish to send me an email: [email protected]

You MUST include your full name, full address and postcode in every email as Members of Parliament may only correspond with their own constituents.

Do check the spelling carefully – a misspelt email address is the most common reason why constituents occasionally say they have not had a reply.

Note - do not include links in your email as I will not open these for security and your message is highly likely to end up in the Parliamentary spam filtering system. Small PDF attachments (under 1Mb) generally are ok.
